title: Bike Sharing (1,001 rows)
subtitle: A real mixed-data SPN trained offline on hourly bike rental demand.
about: This exported SPN is trained offline on 1,001 hourly Capital Bikeshare rows from the UCI Bike Sharing dataset, using weather, calendar, and demand variables. The requested 1,000-row subset expands to 1,001 rows so every categorical level remains representable. The structure comes from learnSPN. The browser loads only this static JSON model; no training or backend inference happens on the website.
